reviews.review_description: I'm pleasantly surprised at the parking dynamics as being pretty accurate, the graphics might not be the best, but this is a nice way to practice in a realistic set of physics, hopefully future updates will use airlines and electric connector along with hitch pin release for additional realism... It's worth the price!

The game is fun closest thing you can get to a trucking game Disney to graphic major graphic upgrade More functional buttons inside the cabin like a CB radio or you can hear it listen to music on the radio and change the channel to what you want to listen to buttons where you can grow both down the windows windshield wiper function add dramatic weather like rain thunderstorm evening time night time driving more deliveries better graphics on the building more 3D buildings people walking around if you can put people in the environment to make it look alive animals and birds and some bugs fixed where sometimes you stand next to the truck and they'll go flying or you'll get a trailer and it'll just disappear on you or take off flying in the air One time I want to climb my truck and it flew off in the sky please fix that this game can be a beautiful game it need a graphical upgrade where if you traveling is boats in the water The buildings where you pick up the low look more realistic like people's there and the buildings look more instead of a like a dead empty lot gas stations where you got to pull over to refill your truck More things in an environment to make the game look more live it looks dead better 3D cars you can upgrade the game to quest 3 graphics and you got something going here they trying to put out a trucking game that looks good but if you can upgrade your graphics and fix the bugs on your game it'll be wonderful put some people in environment make the building look like they asking people in the building you need 3D buildings with gloss glare and make it where you can climb into the truck by opening the door and some trucks has keys where you got to turn the ignition to start the truck up some buildings you can go inside to make purchases like food and the refill yourself long highways with freeways with names on it so I feel like you really getting on the freeway more animals and birds and environment

reviews.review_title: update the game, it's already boring to
reviews.review_description: Game 100 out of 10. But can you please add European countries and more trucks
This game is hard but fun so I’m defidentally not refunding the Amarican trucks are very good
Best game you should get

reviews.review_title: it’s alright, but add a manual shift opt
reviews.review_description: i really like this game, it’s fun although the levels are really boring and i just want to have all the trucks, the one thing that would make this game 5 stars is the option to manually shift through gears.
Im not complaining but to start the car you could use keys and you should add an America map
Not that good of a game truck flies away from you and the navigation is bad

reviews.review_title: Very nice game, but lots of bugs!
reviews.review_description: Love this game, tried the demo and purchased shortly after. It's very buggy, i.e. often the view is not centered and if you try and center it again it seems to have some kind of offset (the view is always shifted to the right, have to turn my head to the left to get a better centering, also it places you too far back on the driver's seat, and farther every time you recenter). Graphics is "essential", especially the lighting, could be much better. But overall it's still fun and realistic enough for me that have never driven a real truck.

reviews.review_title: Rough start but will give it another try
reviews.review_description:
I was looking forward to this title. It’s so broken that the tutorial doesn’t work which left me guessing what to do. Once I get in the cab I can’t get out to raise the trailer legs. I’ve seen videos with people who have an Oculus 3 like mine do a working tutorial. So why is mine broken!
UPDATE
So I uninstalled then reinstalled. The issues I had seemed to be resolved. Truck still flies when hit. I’m leaving a 3 star review for now and update after some gameplay. Also thanks to the developer for a quick response!

developer_response.body: For issues like this please contact us at support@twinsoftwarestudio.com

reviews.review_title: Very good but a couple problems.
reviews.review_description:
The game overall is very good a nice sized map and cabs but I wish they were more interactive instead of just some picture files. The AI traffic is alright I mean it sneaks up the side of you when you are taking a turn very wide meaning you have to either reverse or just carry on and turn around further down the road. Next, they should observe and follow the traffic signs better as when there is a yield sign they sometimes go through it no matter what (leading into them ramming into my trailer).
I wish when you buy trailers at the home they could be transferred onto the free roam instead of dog the stock rigid and tracker trailer trailers it would make it so much more fun and immersive because the current trailers are short, (giving longer trailers will give a harder difficulty)

Very janky, co trolls aren’t smooth, trucks fly away from you, tutorial gets stuck, settings randomly change (like driver seat position left or rights side).  All that and I played for only about 30mins. This game must’ve gotten most of its ratings back when the quest first came out and basically anything that was made got good ratings because it was novel. Times have changed. Also. I have great VR legs but this game makes me a queasy.
Trucks fly away from you would not recommend this game

developer_response.body: We know about this problem that will be solved in the next update (estimated at the end of November or in December)

reviews.review_description: I like everything about it but It would be better if there were other countries we could go to and if it was multiplayer
But could it please update.

developer_response.body: This year in December, a new update will appear.

reviews.review_description: I’ve showed this to state inspectors and instructors at the CDLA school.  They think this is amazing.  They made fun of the guy who turned right at the intersection for turning wrong and not using the “button turn method” (if I said the method name right)

reviews.review_title: Great game, one problem, One glitch.
reviews.review_description: I’m using this to boost my confidence before my class-a test. It’s a great way to learn how a truck moves and how to park. Only problem is the hand tracking. Sometimes the steering wheel will go tho opposite way from where I move it. There are some funny glitches that happen sometimes. For example my truck went flying off one time because I walked into it, I’m sure these glitches will be fixed in the future. Great game, keep updating the game devs! Don’t abandon it!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, yes it is possible for the truck to fly, this is due to the connection between the truck and the trailer. I can only improve but I won't be able to get rid of the problem permanently because it doesn't depend only on me and it also depends on the game engine. You will see that once you have experience in the game, you will be able to easily avoid the events that could lead you to problems. We will continue to improve the game.

reviews.review_description:
It is obviously still in development so any feedback is just to be considered by the developer. In its current state it is fun, playable and enjoyable game with an incredible open world that allows you to casually take jobs and deliver them. I use to drive trucks so experienced truck driver reviewing the game. I can tell the developers have added details that show they may have some first hand experience being in the cabin of a truck. Wind, mirrors, etc. This definitely reminds me of the days I used to dock and brought back memories, I can confirm that this process at low speeds is extremely accurate and I’m getting some great practice. However, a few tips and things I would like to see.

1. Control at high speeds when turning, must be improved. The current feeling is playable but feels too light. So light that the trucks feels like it’s drifting at times and floating. So it’s better and easier to play at low speeds under 50.

2. Sounds when load has been attached and delivered.

3. This one is obvious night time, lights and rain with wiper blades.

4. Map is too zoomed in, a lot of last second turns because of this. Must be guided better or zoomed out a little so we can prepare for the turn.

5. Can you please add different trailers in the open world.

For now that’s it, love this game thank you!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, I have considered some suggestions. In the next update 1.2 we will solve the sensation at high speeds and add sound when connecting and disconnecting trailers, but many other novelties will also be added. We will consider the rest of the proposals for rain, lights, night and changes to the map in a possible new game.

reviews.review_description:
Loving this it really makes your mind work on awareness of direction speed and location and the load ( trailer!) 

Things this needs is a seat adjustment option… ! 
And the smooth turn needs to be a bit quicker!

Would like to see full gear option ( lorries can have 18 gears i think 🤔) loading cargo 😁 but I know the developer (‘s) knows all this and am keeping my eyes on the road plan of coming up dates! 😊

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review, we will consider the proposals you have. If you have other proposals, you can contact us by email or on social networks.

reviews.review_description: It’s fun !! Get the game !!!
